title: Structural analysis and design using generative AI
inputData: FEA仿真数据（位移、应力、应变）、足底压力传感器数据
contribution: 提出了一种结合FEA仿真与CNN替代模型的工作流，利用数字孪生技术和ANSYS/PyMAPDL生成训练数据，构建了可快速评估足部矫形器设计的九个CNN模型（三种步态x三种尺寸），无需专业人员操作即可实现实时应力/应变分布预测
abstract: This study addresses the urgent need for effective evaluation of orthotic designs to meet the growing clinical need for rapid and large-scale evaluations. Traditional methods for validating foot orthotics are laborious and time-consuming, posing challenges for clinicians and manufacturers. To overcome these limitations, the methodology involves a comprehensive literature review and the development of a workflow that incorporates digital twin models, alternative models, and finite element analysis (FEA) simulations. Advanced tools such as ANSYS, Machine Learning, etc. through digital twin technology. Simulation experiments are conducted for various gait scenarios. The results show that the integration of FEA and AI significantly improves the efficiency of orthotic design evaluation and suggests optimization directions for future work.
methodology: FEA simulations were performed in ANSYS on 12 standard foot orthotic models (three sizes, two thicknesses) across three gait conditions, with data extracted and augmented via Latin Hypercube Sampling using PyMAPDL. A CNN with four convolutional/pooling layers and a dense layer was trained on the resulting dataset to serve as a surrogate model that predicts deformation, elastic strain, and normal stress.
results: The trained CNN surrogate models achieved predictions within a 20% error tolerance compared to direct ANSYS FEA results, with the Python-based PyMAPDL recalculations matching ANSYS software results to 14 decimal places. The maximum observed values across all simulations were 0.21805mm total deformation (L-size forefoot strike), 0.00055631 normal elastic strain (S-size forefoot strike), and 0.98845 MPa normal stress (S-size forefoot strike).
pdfFile: Park, M. etal - 2024 - Structural analysis and design using generative AI.pdf
markdownFile: Park, M. etal - 2024 - Structural analysis and design using generative AI.md
inputDataEn: FEA simulation data (displacement, stress, strain), foot pressure sensor data
